text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the day of Winning Ticket's debut has
arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I must keep her spirits high,
because she starts getting itchy when she feels
anxious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overcoming her nerves—and itchiness—she heads
off to her debut!
